concerns: Lint/typecheck/test scripts should use lightweight stubs (e.g. `tsc --noEmit` for typecheck, `echo no tests` for test) rather than installing ESLint/Vitest, since those tools are out of scope for this ticket — the plan acknowledges this risk but should be explicit about the stub approach chosen
Pin exact versions of vite and typescript in package.json to avoid non-deterministic installs across environments
